completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests mock `create_deep_agent` at the import site (`agents.coach.create_deep_agent`)
completion_promises.evidence: All @patch decorators in TestDelegationToCreateDeepAgent, TestNoBackend, TestSystemPromptPassthrough, TestMemoryPassthrough, TestCoachToolsInvariant, and TestCoachEdgeCases use `agents.coach.create_deep_agent` as the patch target (import site, not definition site).

TestDelegationToCreateDeepAgent.test_passes_empty_tools_list verifies `call_kwargs.kwargs.get('tools') == []`. TestCoachEdgeCases.test_coach_with_local_provider also verifies tools=[] as belt-and-suspenders across providers.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests verify `backend` is NOT in `call_args` kwargs (or is `None`)
completion_promises.evidence: TestNoBackend.test_no_backend_kwarg_or_none asserts `backend_value is None` from call_args. TestCoachEdgeCases.test_coach_with_local_provider also verifies backend is None.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Module-level import assertion: `FilesystemBackend` NOT in `agents/coach.py` attributes
completion_promises.evidence: TestNoFilesystemBackendImport has two methods: test_filesystem_backend_not_in_source (AST inspection of all imports) and test_filesystem_backend_not_in_source_text (string search in source text). Both verify FilesystemBackend is never imported.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Signature inspection test: `create_coach` has no `tools` parameter
completion_promises.evidence: TestCreateCoachSignature.test_create_coach_has_no_tools_parameter uses inspect.signature to verify 'tools' is not in the parameter set, with a descriptive assertion message referencing D5.
All 21 tests are in agents/tests/test_coach_factory.py, which is within the agents/tests/ testpath configured in pyproject.toml.

test_output_summary: 21 tests passed, 0 failed. Coverage: 100.0% for agents/coach.py (13 statements, 0 missed).
implementation_notes: Updated existing test file: corrected docstring to reference TASK-AF-009 (was TASK-AF-004), added TestCoachEdgeCases class with 4 new tests covering provider independence (openai, local), custom temperature (0.3), default temperature (0.7), and local provider with endpoint while maintaining D5 invariant. All 6 acceptance criteria fully satisfied. The file uses patch-at-import-site pattern, call_args.kwargs destructuring, AST-based module inspection, and inspect.signature for structural enforcement.
